params.name: Fu Hao Scripts
params.source: Fragment Crafting (4.1%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.18%), Wishing (0.15%)
params.description:
On Dec 7, 1245 BC, Fu Hao died of illness and was buried together with turtle texts, which recorded her achievements.

Fu Hao, a famous female general in Shang Dynasty. In the existing turtle texts, her name appears over two hundred times alone from the 10,000 turtle texts unearthed in Anyang Yin Xu Ruins. In her conquests of nearby states, Fu Hao was the general commanded multiple military operations and achieving great exploits in Shang's expansion. She was also assigned to host worship ceremo …
